---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  grid-columns: 2
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
ML · Quant · Data Science
:::
# Writing about data, models, and the messy bits in between.

A portfolio of projects and analyses in machine learning, econometrics, and data science.
:::
---
